user.title: Connect Toss Invest
user.description: Enter the Toss Securities Open API client credentials issued for your account. Credentials are stored only in this Home Assistant config entry and are never written to logs.

account.title: Select account
account.description: Choose the Toss Securities account this integration should track.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Toss Invest
reauth_confirm.description: Your Toss Securities credentials were rejected. Enter updated credentials for the same account to resume updates.

error.invalid_auth: The client ID or client secret was rejected.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Toss Securities API. This is usually temporary.
error.no_accounts: No accounts were found for these credentials.
error.account_not_found: The account configured for this entry was not found for these credentials.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The new credentials do not match the account being reauthenticated.

init.title: Toss Invest options
init.description: Configure refresh intervals, optional data, and alert thresholds. All numeric options are bounded to safe ranges.
